parts.name: Base
parts.benefit: Hitpoints, defences and speed of the raft.

parts.name: Hull
parts.benefit: Hitpoints, defences and speed of the boat.

parts.name: Helm
parts.benefit: Navigation; higher tiers resist stronger rapids.

parts.name: Mast & sails
parts.benefit: Speed; trim every 30 seconds for a boost and Sailing xp.

parts.name: Keel
parts.benefit: Armour and hitpoints; adamant+ opens crystal-flecked waters.

parts.name: Cargo hold
parts.benefit: Stores cargo and salvage while sailing.

parts.name: Salvaging hook
parts.benefit: Salvage shipwrecks while sailing for xp and salvage.

parts.name: Cannon
parts.benefit: Boat combat; fires cannonballs up to its own tier.

parts.name: Teleport focus
parts.benefit: Lets Summon Boat teleport the boat to your dock or mooring.

parts.name: Wind catcher
parts.benefit: Stores wind motes; release for a speed boost at sea.

parts.name: Trawling net
parts.benefit: Used for deep-sea trawling.

parts.name: Chum station
parts.benefit: Baits shoals while deep-sea trawling.

parts.name: Fathom stone
parts.benefit: Locates shoals while deep-sea trawling.

parts.name: Range
parts.benefit: Cook food at sea.

parts.name: Keg
parts.benefit: Stores ales rewarded from sea charting.

parts.name: Anchor
parts.benefit: Holds the boat in place at sea.

parts.name: Inoculation station
parts.benefit: Safely traverse the Shrouded Ocean's fetid waters.

parts.name: Salvaging station
parts.benefit: Sort salvage on board.

parts.name: Crystal extractor
parts.benefit: Generates wind motes for the wind/gale catcher.

parts.name: Eternal brazier
parts.benefit: Safely traverse the icy Northern Ocean.
